description_long: This is a young adult male standing upright, dressed in casual loungewear suitable for an urban or residential environment. He wears a long-sleeved sweatshirt with a large diamond emblem on the chest and matching pajama-style pants adorned with a repeating pattern. His feet are covered with novelty animal slippers, adding a playful touch to his appearance. The figure has short, textured hair and a neutral facial expression, with arms relaxed and slightly extended at his sides. The overall look suggests comfort and leisure, making him a plausible character for street, park, or neighborhood scenes.
description: A casually dressed young adult male in a sweatshirt, patterned pants, and animal slippers, standing upright with a relaxed posture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the diamond-emblem sweatshirt, patterned pants, animal slippers, and facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the fit of the clothing, and the side of the slippers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back of the sweatshirt, the back of the patterned pants, and the slippers' heels.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, the side seam of the clothing, and the slippers from the opposite side.
attribute_clothing_type: casual sweatshirt and pajama-style pants with novelty slippers
